location:

Greaves of Solitude protect both of the player's legs and feet by applying various defensive properties. They also change the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Greaves of Solitude Leg Armor can be found at:
Can be obtained after defeating the Blackgaol Knight found inside Western Nameless Mausoleum. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

location:

name: Circlet of Light
description: Circlet of Light is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Circlet of Light is not part of a set, and originally belonged to Miquella. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Circlet of Light Helm can be found at Enir-Ilim:
First, defeat Promised Consort Radahn / Radahn, Consort of Miquella in Enir-Ilim. After the battle, at the center of the boss arena, towards the golden orb. Select "Touch Memory" to trigger a cutscene. You'll obtain this item after the cutscene plays. [Map Link] [Video Link]

Crucible Hammer-Helm protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Crucible Hammer-Helm Helm can be found at:
Dropped by Devonia, Crucible Knight near Rauh Ancient Ruins, East Grace. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Death Mask Helm
description: Death Mask Helm is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Death Mask Helm is not part of a set and reduces the FP cost of summoned Spirits. Death Mask Helm protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders but may be slightly different for male and female characters. This helm has a special bonus of reducing the FP cost for spirit summons, making it good option for spells/skills builds.
location:
The Death Mask Helm Helm can be found at:
Drops from Fire Knight Wego in the cathedral area of Shadow Keep, after draining out the water. He can be easily identified as he wears a different head piece and summons Burning Putrid Corpses. [Map Link]

name: Divine Beast Head
description: Divine Beast Head is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Divine Beast Head is not part of a set, and is literally the head of the Divine Beast Dancing Lion. Divine Beast Head protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both body types but may be slightly different depending on body type.
location:
The Divine Beast Head Helm can be found at:
The Divine Beast Dancing Lion of the Belurat, Tower Settlement drops this Helm upon defeat. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

Not to be confused with the Divine Beast Helm

name: Greatjar
description: Greatjar is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Greatjar is not a part of any set and resembles a jar, just like Iron Fist Alexander. Greatjar protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Greatjar Helm can be found at:
Belurat Gaol: After leaving the jar labyrinth, you will pass a small bridge and fight 3 Mutated Prisoners, on quite a large platform. In order to advance the dungeon, you have to step on the jar at the end of the area, but don't do that. Instead, turn right to find another jar on a slightly lower level. Step on it, and it will take you high. Once there, jump from platform to platform, and once the area, opens up, the item is on a pedestal, beware of the enemies. [Map Location] [Video Link]

name: Imp Head (Lion)
description: Imp Head (Lion) is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand-new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Imp Head (Lion) is not part of a set and is often worn by Imps in dungeons. Imp Head (Lion) protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Imp Head (Lion) Helm can be found at:
Scorpion River Catacombs. When you enter the area with two spiked ceilings and a bridge under the gaze of a deadly basilisk. Cross the bridge towards the next lift, and stop at the end, then jump on the ledge to the left and follow it up towards the basilisk. Jump on the spiked ceiling as it drops and ride it up to a platform with this item. [Elden Ring Map] [Video Link]

location:

From the West Rampart Site of Grace, take the bridge all the way. Use Torrent to avoid being trappped in the Rain of Fire. Defeat the Fire Knight at the end to obtain this and Rain of Fire. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

Initiating Thiollier's sidequest is not required to obtain this item.

name: Winged Serpent Helm
description: Winged Serpent Helm is a Helm in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Helm in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Winged Serpent Helm is not a part of a set. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders but may be slightly different for male and female characters. This helm is a good selection for builds focusing on Fire Knight Skills.
location:
The Winged Serpent Helm Helm can be found at:
Shadow Keep: Sixth Floor: Climb the statues once you've used the lever to move them. Head outside, turn right and head up the stairs, turn left to the bridge which leads to Messmer boss fight, the Fire knight is right before and drops this item and Ash of War: Flame Spear. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map] [Video Location]

name: Leda's Armor
description: Leda's Armor is a Chest Armor in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Chest Armor in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Leda's Armor is an individual piece that doesn't belong to any set and belongs to Needle Knight Leda.
location: Leda's Armor is found on Needle Knight Leda's corpse after you beat the Leda and Allies Boss fight [Map Link] [Video Link]
